## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Vapi and GrowthX for content strategy and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a 90-day pilot program focusing on editorial content, programmatic SEO, and potentially link building](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Vapi team interested in leveraging Marcel's growth expertise beyond just content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Potential for mutual product integration and promotion between Vapi and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Three-pronged approach: website analysis, persona development, and competitor mindshare analysis](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Editorial content and programmatic SEO (e.g., glossaries, app catalogs) work in tandem](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Weekly meetings to refine strategy and pivot quickly based on company needs](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Team includes industry veterans from TripAdvisor, TechCrunch, and other major tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)

### Vapi-Specific Strategy Ideas

  - [Create pre-generated voice agents with LLM prompts as public templates](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Balance between broad appeal and developer-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Potential for creating a catalog of fully functioning voice app demos](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Timeline and Process

  - [90-day pilot period to de-risk engagement](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Aim to start publishing by week 3 or 4](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Kickoff dates available: April 21st or 28th (pending confirmation)](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

### Additional Services

  - [Link building to increase domain authority (not included in initial proposal)](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO initiatives (can be added later if desired)](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Mutual Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Marcel offered strategic growth advice in exchange for building voice agents use cases](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Potential for content creation around Vapicon](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Exploring product integration possibilities (e.g., AI-powered interview bots)](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jordan to review the SLW (Statement of Work) sent by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Vapi team to consider adding link building and programmatic SEO to the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Confirm kickoff date (April 21st prioritized, but subject to change)](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Jordan to follow up with Marcel via text for any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Explore potential for Vapi to create a qualification bot for GrowthX's website](https://fathom.video/share/LmC9AiyhyaNVpsoroG8ScoSucGFz3WsD?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
